## nsc auth issue-id-token

Generate a Namespace ID token to authenticate with cloud providers.

```
nsc auth issue-id-token [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --audience string     The audience of an ID token.
      --duration duration   How long the token should last (default 0s)
  -h, --help                help for issue-id-token
  -o, --output string       One of plain or json. (default "plain")
```

* [nsc auth](nsc_auth.md)	 - Authentication related operations (e.g. login).
